description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and everyone of its creations. Wear this black dress with strappy sandals and accessorise subtly for an understated elegant look or with chunky jewellery for a loud and fashion focused look. Product Details Black one shoulder sleeveless dress with tiered ruffles around the entire neckline Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 79 cm from shoulder to hem
